content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

July 31, 2006

Vicki Chimbole, Treasurer
34th District Club
Roberson Realty
13031 Pearblossom Highway
P.O. Box 616
Pearblossom, CA 93553

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-133

Dear Ms. Chimbole:

This letter is in response to your request regarding the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 Pursuant to our conversation, you have withdrawn your request for written advice.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Barbara Smith
Political Reform Consultant

BS:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\W-06-133

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
